Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate Cross-Complaint From Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ROBERT BASSINETTE'S MOTION TO BIFURCATE CROSS-COMPLAINT FROM COMPLAINT

Appearances: Paul Kanter of the Law Offices of Mark Mittelman (925.256.0677) for Business Alliance Insurance Company; Stanley Smith of Niven & Smith (415.981.5451) for Stephen Wong and Har Kwan Luk; Scott Freedman of Zacks & Freedman (415.956.8100) for plaintiff and moving party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED without prejudice. Bifurcation of the Cross-Complaint filed by the defendants will not achieve the Plaintiff's desired goal of setting their Complaint for trial, as on November 26, 2024, another Cross-Complaint by a third party was filed and is not yet at issue. Plaintiff's motion filed before the November 26, 2024, cross-complaint understandably did not address it or its effect on setting the complaint for trial. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
